problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
